core/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/dr.general_idea: Mark the definitions field as transient to exclude it from serialization, likely to prevent serialization issues or reduce overhead in Java 17.

core/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/va.general_idea: Add Checker Framework @NonNull annotation to function parameter to enforce null-safety checks.

maven-plugin/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Removed import for a utility class that is no longer used in the file.
Replaced specific java.net and java.util imports with broader java.io and java.util imports to support new implementation.
Removed 'private' modifier from Maven plugin parameters to allow default access, likely for testing or framework compatibility.
Added a new configuration parameter 'failOnWarning' to control plugin behavior.
Added a new configuration parameter 'classpath' to allow explicit classpath definition.
Renamed the method call in execute() to reflect the new classpath loading logic.
Implemented the failOnWarning() method required by the PluginBase interface.
Refactored classpath loading to use Java Streams and File paths instead of URLClassLoader, removing dependency on ProjectClassLoader.
Removed explicit setter methods for plugin parameters, relying on Maven's default injection or direct field access.

maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Restructure test class using JUnit 5 @Nested classes to group tests by context (no artifacts vs. with artifacts).
maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.human_impl: Wrapped existing tests in `@Nested class TestsWithNoArtifacts` and added `@TempDir` for new tests.

maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Update test code to use direct field assignment instead of setter methods, reflecting changes in the production code's encapsulation.
Correct the implementation of `shouldSkipFileIfIsNotOnSearchPath` to actually verify the file list is empty rather than just calling execute.
Add a new test case to verify that project artifacts are correctly added to the project classloader.

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Introduce a method to configure whether warnings should be treated as failures during validation.
Modify the validation logic to fail on warnings if the failOnWarning flag is enabled.
Add a method to load the project classpath into a custom class loader for plugin execution.
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.human_impl: default void loadProjectClasspath(List<String> projectClasspath) { ... ProjectClassLoader.INSTANCE.classLoader = new URLClassLoader(urlProjectClasspath); }

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Remove unused imports from the Checker Framework library.
Mark fields as final to enforce immutability where they are only assigned in the constructor.
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.human_impl: Changed `protected Consumer<CharSequence> info;` to `protected final Consumer<CharSequence> info;` (and similarly for warn/error).

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Add final modifier to test instance fields to enforce immutability and follow modern Java best practices.
Add existence check before creating directories to prevent potential issues or redundant calls, improving robustness.
Add a new test case to verify support for DMN 1.3 standard examples.
Remove unnecessary intermediate variable in assertion to make the test code more concise.
Add a new test case to verify that loops in diagrams are correctly detected.
Add a new test case to verify behavior when failOnWarning is set to true.
Add a new test case to verify behavior when failOnWarning is set to false.
Add a new test case to verify that external artifacts are correctly added to the project classloader.

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.general_idea: Integrate JCommander to allow configuring the server port via command-line arguments instead of hardcoding it.
Replace raw stack trace printing with SLF4J logger calls for better error handling and observability.
Extract the logic for providing a default error message into a dedicated static helper method to reduce duplication.
server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.human_impl: private static String nullsafeError(@Nullable String message) { return Optional.ofNullable(message).orElse("Unknown Error"); }

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.general_idea: Reformat the stream processing chain in validationResultsToJson for improved readability and consistent indentation.
server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.human_impl: return new JSONObject().put("items", validationResults.stream().map(vr -> new JSONObject() ...).collect(Collectors.toList()));

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Introduce a helper method to determine if an expression language corresponds to FEEL based on namespace constants or string value.
validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.human_impl: private static boolean expressionLanguageIsFeel(final String expressionLanguage) { ... }

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Add an overloaded parse method that accepts an Expression object, checks the language, and delegates to the existing parser or returns a warning.
validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.human_impl: public static Either<ValidationResult.Builder.ElementStep, FeelExpression> parse(final Expression expression) { ... }

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Add necessary imports for the new helper method and overloaded parse method logic.
validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.human_impl: import de.redsix.dmncheck.result.Severity; import de.redsix.dmncheck.util.Expression; import org.camunda.bpm.model.dmn.impl.DmnModelConstants; import java.util.Arrays;

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Add support for the subtraction operator in unary expressions to expand language coverage.
Replace deprecated or legacy Either chaining methods with modern functional equivalents for cleaner code.
Rename the enum constant from lowercase 'instance' to uppercase 'INSTANCE' to comply with Java naming conventions for constants.
